notes: Denver carpet cleaning company also offering water/fire damage restoration. Site is extremely dated with text-wall formatting, no online booking, form-only contact. Phone: 303-317-3420. No email visible on site. URL structure (denvercarpet-cleaning.net with hyphens) appears SEO-focused. The site has heavy keyword stuffing and reads more like a text directory than a professional service business. Massive conversion opportunity — the business offers 24/7 emergency services but has virtually no emergency CTA on site.
